meaning: n.[化]钪,金属元素之一,符号为Sc,原子序为21
examples: With scandium and yttrium, they make up the rare earth metals.
Scandium-modified Al alloys are a new kind of high performance alloys.
They turned out to be the undiscovered elements scandium, gallium, technetium and germanium.
Others would add either one or both of yttrium and scandium to the list.
For scandium just is the best thing to make solid oxide fuel cells out of.
